subject: Re: Quick follow-up, Alban
original:
De Cronos Groep's footprint-9,000+ people, ~5,000 customers, and activity
across five continents-really stood out to me.

I sent a short note earlier and wanted to follow up (no rush). With your
mix of consulting, software/IT services, and investments across 600+
companies, I'd like to understand where you're currently most focused.

Worth a quick 10-minute call to see if there's any overlap between De
Cronos Groep and Cronos?

subject: Re: Quick note from a fellow “Cronos”
original:
yur

I'm Alban at Cronos (fun coincidence on the name), and I was curious how
you're prioritizing new initiatives across software engineering/mobile and
the 600+ ventures you're involved in.

Worth a quick 10-minute call to see if there's any overlap we should
explore, or should I speak with someone else on your side?

subject: Re: icapps’ “Think, Build and Care”
body: I'm looking forward to working together.
snippet: I'm looking forward to working together.
original:
Alana, I noticed icapps' "Think, Build and Care" approach to end-to-end
digital products-from custom software to mobile apps for large partners.

I'm Alban at Cronos. We work with teams building future-proof products and
help streamline delivery when projects need extra momentum (capacity,
focus, or execution support).

Open to a quick 15-minute chat to see if there's any area in your current
pipeline where an extra pair of hands would be useful?
